Ok(
    RateLimit {
        status: "allowed",
        resets_at: Some(
            12345,
        ),
        session_id: "abc",
        rate_limit_type: Some(
            "five_hour",
        ),
        utilization: Some(
            0.24,
        ),
        is_using_overage: Some(
            false,
        ),
    },
)
